task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to a patent database to research the target patent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to a patent database (e.g., Google Patents) showing US Patent 5,255,452 ('Method and means for creating anti-gravity illusion').

task_completion.description: Verifies the full patent PDF was saved to the expected directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager showing 'US5255452.pdf' inside the '/home/ga/Documents/Patents/' directory, a browser download completion dialog showing this path, or a PDF viewer open with this file.

task_completion.description: Verifies the summary text file was created at the expected path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, mousepad) open with the file path '/home/ga/Documents/Patents/patent_summary.txt' or the file visible in the file manager.

task_completion.description: Verifies the summary file contains the correct first listed inventor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text written inside 'patent_summary.txt' and verify it contains the name 'Michael J. Jackson'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the summary file contains the correct filing date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text written inside 'patent_summary.txt' and verify it contains the date '1992-06-29'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the summary file contains the correct patent number for the cited document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text written inside 'patent_summary.txt' and verify it contains the patent number '1059284' or 'US1059284A'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used a real web browser to search for the patent information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a GUI web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) being actively used to search for the patent and its citations, rather than the agent hallucinating the information or using curl/python scripts exclusively.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually downloaded or printed the patent to PDF from the source.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with a 'Download PDF' button on the patent website or a 'Print to PDF' dialog, rather than the agent creating a blank or dummy PDF file via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't just type the answers from prior knowledge without looking them up.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the agent actually viewed the filing date, inventor list, and the specific citation ('Ladder-gripping attachment for shoes') on the patent page before typing them into the summary file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patent: US5255452. First Inventor: Michael J. Jackson. Filing Date: 1992-06-29. Cited Document ('Ladder-gripping attachment for shoes') Patent Number: 1059284 (or US1059284A). Expected PDF path: /home/ga/Documents/Patents/US5255452.pdf. Expected summary path: /home/ga/Documents/Patents/patent_summary.txt.
